name: Philly-Style White Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 Loaf Frozen White Bread - dough, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute vegetables in 1 tablespoon olive oil until limp; add roast beef.
2. Continue sauteing for three more minutes.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce and seasonings; cook for 2-3 more minutes and remove from heat.
4. Dust work surface with flour and roll out bread dough to fit a 10-inch x 15-inch cookie sheet.
5. Grease the cookie sheet and place the dough into the pan, creating a rim of dough around the edges of the pan.
6. Brush remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil over the dough and spread crushed garlic evenly over the surface.
7. Top with a light layer of shredded cheese, then the meat/vegetable mixture, distributing evenly.
8. Add another layer of shredded cheese and sprinkle Parmesan on top.
9. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
10. Let sit for 5 minutes before cutting and serving.
